Notice Of Motion And Motion To: (1) Compel Response To Demand Production Of Documents (2) Compel Production Of Documents (3) And For Sanctions And Exhibith A (Filed Separately And Concurrently Herewith)
Off Calendar Jun-25-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES:
ROBERT H. POWSNER, ESQ. for plaintiff and moving party: JAR MEDIA LLC.

NO OTHER APPEARANCES. THE TENTATIVE RULING WAS ADOPTED AS MODIFIED: PLAINTIFF JAR MEDIA LLC's Motion To Compel Response To Demand For Production Of Documents And To Compel Production Of Documents is granted as it seeks responses and documents. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff's request for sanctions is denied as there is no declaration setting for facts supporting any amount of monetary sanctions. [See C.C.P. Section 2023.040.] To respond and produce within 15 days of notice of order. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. NOT REPORTED.
